capabilities.requirement: Shared operating contract and exact trigger parity
capabilities.claude: CLAUDE.md includes AGENTS.md; Claude skill adapter loads at each named trigger
capabilities.codex: Codex reads AGENTS.md directly; matching .agents skill adapter loads at each named trigger

capabilities.requirement: All 18 workflow skills discoverable without cross-runtime tool vocabulary
capabilities.codex: .agents/skills, the official repository skill location

capabilities.requirement: Asynchronous worker dispatch with complete isolated brief
capabilities.codex: spawn_agent with fork_turns=none and generated brief

capabilities.requirement: One task, one guarded worktree; managed clone remains read-only
capabilities.codex: dm-worktree plus absolute worktree in a no-fork brief

capabilities.requirement: Root to domain supervisor to worker delegation
capabilities.codex: nested spawn_agent with max_depth=2 and max_threads=6

capabilities.requirement: Message, steer, interrupt, and resume the same worker
capabilities.codex: send_message, followup_task, interrupt_agent, and list_agents

capabilities.requirement: No polling daemon and no idle model turns
capabilities.codex: mailbox completion and wait_agent

capabilities.requirement: Restart and stuck-worker recovery without split-brain work
capabilities.claude: task reconciliation then same-agent relaunch ladder
capabilities.codex: list/message/interrupt controls then same-task, same-worktree relaunch

capabilities.requirement: Scheduled and CI waits are bounded and visible
capabilities.claude: Monitor or scheduled wake plus dm-pr await-checks
capabilities.codex: attached command wait, dedicated waiter, or scheduled task plus dm-pr await-checks

capabilities.requirement: Recurring open-PR health supervision
capabilities.codex: desktop/web scheduled task invokes dm-pr sweep; CLI prepares prompt only

capabilities.requirement: Lavish approval and feedback loop before delivery
capabilities.codex: no-fork waiter owns the poll; its mailbox completion wakes the parent for worker follow-up

capabilities.requirement: Fast/default/rigorous review, fix, test, security, and PR gates
capabilities.claude: fresh Agent reviewers and shared gate configs
capabilities.codex: fresh fork_turns=none reviewers with focused fallback and shared configs

capabilities.requirement: Address review feedback and red post-open CI
capabilities.codex: same neutral post-pr-review contract

capabilities.requirement: GitHub reads, mutations, checks, and PR merge gates
capabilities.codex: gh-axi/gh through shared toolbelt or installed plugin tools

capabilities.requirement: Real-browser investigation and validation
capabilities.codex: chrome-devtools-axi or Codex Browser Use when available

capabilities.requirement: Reviewable HTML artifacts with plain fallback
capabilities.codex: lavish-axi

capabilities.requirement: References cross worker boundary; secret values never persist
capabilities.codex: same neutral credential-handoff contract

capabilities.requirement: Shared, private, dockmaster-only, global, task, and finding stores
capabilities.claude: plain stores plus optional Claude memory
capabilities.codex: plain stores plus optional Codex memory; durable facts never depend on it

capabilities.requirement: Evidence-first diagnosis separate from implementation authority
capabilities.codex: same neutral diagnostic contract

capabilities.requirement: Conflicts resolved in the task worktree without discarding work
capabilities.codex: same neutral merge-conflict contract

capabilities.requirement: Landed changes revert through the normal gated flow
capabilities.codex: same neutral rollback contract

capabilities.requirement: Real tests, explicit soft skips, bounded flaky handling
capabilities.codex: same neutral testing contract plus dm-test

capabilities.requirement: Multi-repo intent fans out to independently gated child tasks
capabilities.codex: fleet-change skill and bounded spawn_agent fan-out

capabilities.requirement: Optional deterministic PR runner retains all configured gates
capabilities.codex: same injected runner only on a compatible host; native pr-workflow fallback is complete

capabilities.requirement: Never merge red, honor authority, preserve branches and unlanded work
capabilities.codex: shared gates plus trust-scoped execpolicy and PreToolUse shell guardrails

capabilities.requirement: Preserve quality/performance without unsupported capability claims
capabilities.codex: tier, task shape, focused fork_turns=none context, and bounded fan-out; no per-spawn model claim

capabilities.requirement: External GitHub/browser/review capabilities either degrade explicitly or fail loudly at the point of use, never disappear silently
capabilities.claude: lavish-axi/chrome-devtools-axi degrade to direct review and no browser; GitHub mutations hard-require gh-axi and fail loudly naming the tool (#104)
capabilities.codex: plugins or local tools when installed; focused native/general-agent fallback contracts

capabilities.requirement: Trusted Codex project config validates nesting and destructive-command policy
capabilities.codex: .codex/config.toml plus tested execpolicy and PreToolUse guardrails
